3235040.name: Rubbish
3235040.description:
Explore abandoned garbage by people.

Don't underestimate these garbage, there are actually many unknown treasures hidden inside！

You don't need to operate it yourself, just hand it over to those work machines! You just need to wait for the machine to find the garbage and then use the garbage found in the garbage dump to combine various projects to create more valuable projects and increase your collection.

If you are not satisfied with the synthesized item, you can also decompose it to obtain a small amount of garbage or higher quality garbage again!

If you have the opportunity to obtain extremely rare treasures, you can exchange them for physical items!

Every 10 types of garbage of the same quality can be combined into corresponding quality of openable packaging.

4 disposal machines can find one garbage every 3 hours：

﻿

﻿1, domestic waste 89.9%

﻿

﻿2, industrial waste 10%

﻿

﻿3. Scientific and technological materials 0.09%

﻿

﻿4. Control items 0.01%

﻿

﻿5. Recordless objects (only available by opening bundles or shredding)
3235040.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
